narrative:
Blanchard Twp. township has 864 registered voters, with 47.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 37.6 percentage points.
